description: Nablarch REST APIサンプルの案件管理アクションクラス。JAX-RSを使った案件の検索・登録・更新・部分更新のREST APIエンドポイントを提供する。
expected_facts: ProjectActionは@Path("/projects")アノテーションが付いたJAX-RSリソースクラスである
UniversalDaoを使ってDB操作（検索・登録・更新）を行っている
BeanUtilを使ってFormとEntityの間でBean変換を行っている
ValidatorUtil.validate()でバリデーションを実行している

answer_correctness.reason: The actual output covers all four expected facts: (1) ProjectAction has @Path('/projects') annotation as a JAX-RS resource class, explicitly mentioned in the Architecture and Components sections; (2) UniversalDao is used for DB operations (search, insert, update), detailed in the Nablarch Framework Usage section; (3) BeanUtil is used for Bean conversion between Forms and Entities, thoroughly documented; (4) ValidatorUtil.validate() is used for validation, explained in detail including why it's used for GET requests. All four expected facts are present and accurately represented without contradiction.

answer_relevancy.reason: The score is 0.97 because the response is highly relevant to ProjectAction, with only minor irrelevancies: the inclusion of analysis duration metadata and a note about session restrictions on knowledge base access, both of which relate to the report generation process rather than ProjectAction itself.

faithfulness.reason: The score is 1.00 because the actual output is perfectly faithful to the retrieval context with no contradictions found!
